parametrized_description: Employees have the option of using Car or Bus for transportation. A Car can carry A employees and produces B units of pollution, while a Bus can carry C employees and produces D units of pollution. At least E employees must be transported, and no more than F Buses can be used. The objective is to minimize the total pollution produced.

D.description: The contaminants generated by a bus

B.description: The contamination generated by an automobile

C.description: The capacity of a bus in terms of employee transportation

E.description: The least amount of employees required for transportation

F.description: The highest amount of buses that can be utilized

A.description: The capacity of a car in terms of employee accommodation

a.description: The quantity of automobiles utilized for conveyance

slack_0.description: Slack variable for constraint: A minimum of E workers need to be transported.

b.description: The quantity of buses utilized for conveyance

constraints.description: A minimum of E workers need to be transported. (Modified to include slack variable slack_0)
constraints.formulation: a * A + b * C - slack_0 = E

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr(a * A + b * C - slack_0 == E)

objective.description: The goal is to reduce the overall pollution created, which is the collective amount of pollution from vehicles like cars and buses.
